risk_factors: Net interest margin compression as deposit beta rises
Litigation reserve build for legacy mortgage origination
Unrealized losses in held-to-maturity Treasury portfolio
company.ai_summary: Wells Fargo & Company's complaint velocity has accelerated meaningfully over the trailing four quarters, with 48 complaints/quarter normalized for headcount well above peer median. Combined with 7 8-K filings over the past 90 days and softening revenue trajectory, we maintain a High risk view and recommend underweight positioning into the next reporting cycle.
